title: Carrot and Banana Squishy Toys Simulation Stress Relief Fidget Toy Set, Stretchable Squeeze Toys for Kids and Adults, Party Favors
features: 【Realistic Dual Design】 This set of stress toys includes a carrot squishy toy and a banana squishy toy, both designed with realistic fruit shapes to bring fun and relaxation. Perfect as a stress toy for kids and adults, these playful designs make every squeeze, stretch, or twist more enjoyable

【Premium TPR Material】 Made of high-quality TPR material, these squishy toys are soft, durable, and safe for all ages. The environmentally friendly design ensures a non-toxic and odorless experience, making them reliable stress relief fidget toys for daily use

【Stretchable and Resilient】 These squeeze toys are built to handle endless fun! Stretch them, twist them, or squeeze as hard as you like—they quickly bounce back to their original shape. Enjoy their incredible durability and keep stress at bay with these versatile fidget toys

【Ideal for Various Settings】 Whether at work, school, or home, these stress relief toys are perfect for relaxation and entertainment. Compact and portable, they can also be used as party favors, helping kids and adults stay focused or unwind during busy days

【Great Gift for All Ages】 Looking for a unique and fun gift? These squishy toys are excellent choices for kids' parties, family gatherings, or as stocking stuffers. Their vibrant design and soothing tactile experience make them beloved stress toys for everyone
description: Product description We are delighted to introduce a new product: a set of carrot and banana squishy toys designed to bring fun and stress relief to your daily life. These realistic stress toys are made from premium TPR material, offering a soft, durable, and safe tactile experience for both kids and adults. Perfect as fidget toys, they can be stretched, squeezed, or twisted and will quickly return to their original shape, making them ideal for relieving stress and improving focus. Compact and lightweight, these squeeze toys are suitable for various settings, including work, school, or home, and can even double as party favors. Whether you're looking for a fun gift or a stress-relief solution, these squishy toys are sure to brighten your day and provide endless entertainment. Safety Warning Do not ingest
